name: Chicken in Plum Sauce - Mwei Jiong Gai - Cant
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Cornstarch mixed with 1/4 Cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. Peel carrots and cut into cubes.
3. Crush garlic.
4. Place oil and garlic in skillet.
5. Brown chicken, stirring for 5 minutes, then cover and reduce heat to simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add plum sauce, celery, ginger, sherry, carrots, sugar, salt, pickles, and water to the skillet.
7. Simmer covered for an additional 12 minutes.
8. Stir in the cornstarch-water mixture until the gravy thickens.
